message:
feat(db): add ATC leader lease for multi-server concurrency safety (br-bn0vb.24)

Implements leader-election lease over the v17 atc_leader_lease table:
- try_acquire_atc_leader_lease(): acquire/renew/steal-expired semantics
- renew_atc_leader_lease(): extend TTL if still leader
- release_atc_leader_lease(): voluntary release
- LeaseOutcome enum with Acquired/NotLeader variants
- Both file-backed and pooled async paths
- 9 new tests: empty table, idempotent, blocked, expired steal, renew
  success/fail, release clears, release noop, is_leader helper

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
